evidence.page_title: Video shows blindfolded Palestinians taken for interrogation
evidence.title: Video shows blindfolded Palestinians taken for interrogation
evidence.description: Dozens of blindfolded Palestinian men can be seen being taken away in Israeli military trucks.
evidence.text:
Video shows blindfolded Palestinians taken for interrogation
Dozens of blindfolded Palestinian men can be seen being taken away in Israeli military trucks, in video shared by Israel’s national broadcaster. Kann News said the men were from Jabalia in north Gaza, which has been under siege for more than a fortnight.
Published On 23 Oct 2024
image_captions: Scenes of Israeli military trucks moving detained and blindfolded Palestinians from Jabalia, for what Israeli media says is interrogation.

evidence.page_title: Dozens of Palestinian men blindfolded and detained in West Bank raid
evidence.title: Dozens of Palestinian men blindfolded and detained in West Bank raid
evidence.description: Israeli forces have been filmed blindfolding and detaining dozens of Palestinians during a raid in occupied Tulkarem.
evidence.text:
Dozens of Palestinian men blindfolded and detained in West Bank raid
Dozens of Palestinian men have been filmed blindfolded and lined up single file as Israeli forces detained them during a raid on a refugee camp in Tulkarem in the occupied West Bank.
Published On 4 Jan 2024
image_captions: Palestinians detained during Israeli raid in Tulkarem, occupied West Bank

evidence.page_title: Disabled boy in Gaza dreams of playing with friends - Al Jazeera
evidence.title: Disabled boy in Gaza dreams of playing with friends
evidence.description: Mohammed Saeed Shabaan is an 8-year-old Palestinian boy from Gaza who lost his limbs in a fire several years ago.
evidence.text:
Disabled boy in Gaza dreams of playing with friends
Disabled boy in Gaza dreams of playing with friends
Mohammed Saeed Shabaan is an 8-year-old Palestinian boy from Gaza who lost his limbs in a fire several years ago. He dreams of receiving prosthetics so he can run around and play like other children.
Published On 25 Dec 2024
